productName: Ooowee - JUICED 1G Infused PreRoll - Grape-A-Licious - Sunset Lemonade - 1g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Sunset Lemonade and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a sweet-tart lemonade flavor, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. Pace yourself.
